home.title: Latest News Feed
home.description: The most recent analyses and updates on the political and economic landscape.
home.welcomeIntro: An open-source platform for simulating policies, exploring public data, and verifying facts. Your tool for informed citizenship.
home.methodologyDesc: We are committed to impartiality and transparency. All our analyses are generated from official public data sources, without partisan bias, ensuring you receive neutral and reliable information.
home.regionalDesc: Dive into the data and discover the economic and social disparities that define the country.

images.portoRibeiraAlt: View of Ribeira in Porto at dusk

home.error: Failed to load feed. Our AI seems to be unavailable.

proposals.subtitle: The most supported ideas by Portuguese citizens.

cookies.title: Cookie Consent
cookies.desc: We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze our traffic. By clicking 'Accept', you consent to our use of cookies as described in our

footer.desc: AI-powered analysis of public policies and economic data, promoting transparency and informed citizenship.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: The analyses and simulations provided on this platform are generated by AI based on public data and should be considered for informational purposes only. They do not constitute financial, legal, or any other form of professional advice.

methodology.title: Our Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Understand how Demokratia combines classic economic models with Artificial Intelligence to analyze the complex puzzle of politics and economics.
methodology.intro: Data visualization of the Portuguese economy.
methodology.okunDesc: It relates the change in the unemployment rate to the change in the gross domestic product (GDP). It allows us to estimate the impact of economic growth policies on employment.
methodology.phillipsDesc: It describes the inverse relationship between inflation and unemployment. It is used to analyze the trade-offs between price stability and employment levels.
methodology.multiplierDesc: It measures the effect that an increase in investment or government spending has on national income. Essential for simulating the impact of fiscal stimulus packages.
methodology.aiDesc: We use Large Language Models (LLMs) trained on a vast body of economic and legislative data. The Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) technique allows our AI to consult our databases of official sources in real-time, ensuring responses are always current and well-founded.
methodology.aiQuote: RAG allows the AI to cite sources like the Diário da República without inventing legal verdicts.
methodology.videoDesc: How does the State Budget work?
methodology.transparencyDesc: We are committed to full transparency. All our analyses are based on public data and official sources. Explore the sources that feed our models.

refutation.title: Contest or Refute Information
refutation.description: If you believe this AI-generated information is incorrect, incomplete, or requires additional context, please submit your refutation with evidence. All submissions are reviewed by our team.
refutation.loginPrompt: Please log in to submit a refutation.
refutation.label: Your refutation or contextualization
refutation.placeholder: Clearly and objectively explain the error or what is missing in the AI analysis...
refutation.textMinError: The refutation must have at least 20 characters.
refutation.success: Your refutation was submitted successfully and is pending review. Thank you for your contribution!

simulations.title: Policy Impact Simulator
simulations.description: Analyze the potential impact of a measure or public policy. Our AI will generate a detailed analysis of the possible consequences.
simulations.input_placeholder: Ex: Increase of the minimum wage to €900
simulations.results_confidence_desc: This value represents the AI model's confidence in its own analysis, based on data quality and policy complexity.

irs.title: IRS Simulator 2024
irs.description: Calculate your 2024 income tax and receive a detailed fiscal analysis and personalized optimization tips.

budget.title: Smart Family Budget
budget.description: Control your finances, set goals, and get AI-driven insights to optimize your savings.

investor.title: Investor Assistant
investor.description: Get market analysis and investment suggestions based on your profile and current data.

waiting.title: Awaiting Analysis
waiting.description: Fill in the fields on the left and click 'Analyze Market' to get an AI-generated strategic analysis.

analyzing.title: Analyzing the market...
analyzing.description: Our AI is processing the data. Please wait a moment.

common.aiUnavailableError: Our AI models are currently experiencing high demand. Please try again in a few moments.
common.genericError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

explorer.title: Data Explorer
explorer.description: Search public statistics or explore our datasets.
explorer.howItWorks: This tool uses generative AI to interpret natural language requests, search official data sources, and present the results in chart or table format. The pre-loaded data is fictional and for demonstration purposes only.
explorer.aiCardDesc: Ask for a statistic and the AI will try to find it.
explorer.textareaPlaceholder: Example: Unemployment rate in Portugal for the last 5 years
explorer.noDataFound: No data was found for your request.
explorer.trySimulator: Your question might be better suited for a simulation.
explorer.officialFooter: The AI searches in real-time from sources like INE, Pordata, Eurostat, Bank of Portugal, and others. The original source is always cited.
explorer.officialSourcesDesc: Governmental and statistical data sources that power our platform.
explorer.saveViewDesc: Save the current configuration for future reference.
explorer.suggestSourceDesc: Found a useful data source? Share it with us.
explorer.sourceNamePlaceholder: Ex: Pordata, INE, Bank of Portugal
explorer.sourcePurpose: Source Purpose (what data does it provide?)
explorer.sourcePurposePlaceholder: Explain what kind of factual data this source provides...

pordata.name: Pordata
pordata.description: Database of Contemporary Portugal, maintained by the Francisco Manuel dos Santos Foundation.

ine.name: National Statistics Institute (INE)
ine.description: Main producer of official statistics in Portugal.

dgo.name: Budget and Treasury Directorate-General (DGO)
dgo.description: Responsible for the preparation, execution, and control of the State Budget.

bportugal.name: Bank of Portugal
bportugal.description: Central bank of the Portuguese Republic.

eurostat.name: Eurostat
eurostat.description: Statistical office of the European Union.

worldbank.name: World Bank Open Data
worldbank.description: Free and open access to global development data.

dbnomics.name: DBnomics
dbnomics.description: Aggregator of economic and financial data from various public sources.

rtp.name: RTP News
rtp.description: Public radio and television news service.

cnn.name: CNN Portugal
cnn.description: International news channel adapted for Portugal.

observador.name: Observador
observador.description: Digital newspaper focused on opinion and analysis.

alpha-vantage.name: Alpha Vantage
alpha-vantage.description: API for real-time and historical data on stocks, forex, and cryptocurrencies.

financial-modeling-prep.name: Financial Modeling Prep
financial-modeling-prep.description: API for real-time and historical financial data, including stocks, forex, and cryptocurrencies.

prompts.expertInLaw: You are an expert in Portuguese law.
prompts.factChecker: You are a world-class fact-checker specializing in Portuguese political and economic claims.
prompts.analyst: You are a world-class economist and political analyst specializing in the Portuguese economy.
prompts.newsAnalyst: You are a Portuguese political and economic news analyst.
prompts.taxExpert: You are a world-class Portuguese tax law expert.
prompts.dataRetriever: You are a data retrieval expert for Portuguese public statistics.
prompts.dataVisualizer: You are a data visualization expert.
prompts.financialAdvisor: You are a world-class financial advisor specializing in Portuguese family budgets.
prompts.investmentAnalyst: You are a world-class financial analyst providing investment advice for the Portuguese market.

instructions.claimToVerify: The user-submitted claim to verify is: "{{claim}}".
instructions.todayIs: Today's date is {{date}}. Your analysis must be based on information available up to this date.
instructions.translateTo: Translate the following text from Portuguese to {{lang}}.
instructions.jsonOutput: Your output MUST be a JSON object that conforms to the following Zod schema:
instructions.jsonOnly: IMPORTANT: Your response must be only a valid JSON object, with no extra text, comments, or markdown formatting.
instructions.textOnly: Your response must be ONLY the translated text, with no extra comments or formatting.
instructions.newsFeedTask: Your task is to generate a feed of the 5 most important and recent topics in Portugal.
instructions.findData: If you find the data, set isFound to true and provide the data as a JSON.stringified array of objects.
instructions.dataNotFound: If you cannot find the specific data, set isFound to false.
instructions.chartable: If chartable, set isChartable to true and format the data.
instructions.notChartable: If not chartable, set isChartable to false.

errors.noResponse: AI did not return a response.
errors.noResponseFor: AI did not return a response for {{context}}.
errors.schemaMismatch: AI response does not match the required schema.
errors.schemaMismatchFor: AI response for {{context}} does not match the required schema.
errors.translationFailed: AI did not return a translation.

average-monthly-earnings-2026.title: Average Monthly Earnings per Worker
average-monthly-earnings-2026.description: Evolution of the gross average monthly earnings of employees. In 2026, a convergence with the European average is observed following the SMN updates.

companies-by-size-2026.title: Companies by Staff Size
companies-by-size-2026.description: Distribution of the Portuguese business fabric by number of workers in 2026. Highlight on the growth of medium-sized technology companies.

government-debt-2026.title: Public Debt as % of GDP (2021-2026)
government-debt-2026.description: Trajectory of the Portuguese public debt. In 2026, Portugal maintains the trend of reduction below the Euro Zone average.

residence-permits-2026.title: Residence Permits Issued and Renewed
residence-permits-2026.description: Statistics on the issuance and renewal of residence permits in Portugal. Data from 2026 reflect the streamlining of integration processes and the strengthening of the agency's response capacity.
residence-permits-2026.source: AIMA - Agency for Integration, Migrations and Asylum 2026

doctors-sns-2026.title: Doctors in the National Health Service (SNS)
doctors-sns-2026.description: Number of doctors in the SNS by specialty. Reflects the 2026 budget increase for talent retention.

early-school-leaving-2026.title: Early School Leaving Rate
early-school-leaving-2026.description: Percentage of young people (18-24 years) who have not completed secondary education. Portugal reaches historic lows in 2026.

higher-education-enrollment-2026.title: Students Enrolled in Higher Education
higher-education-enrollment-2026.description: Total number of students enrolled in universities and polytechnics. Growth driven by AI and Energy Transition courses.

emigration-stats-2026.title: Emigration and Return Flows
emigration-stats-2026.description: Statistics on the departure of national citizens and the impact of the "Regressar 2.0" program in 2026.
